creator: fsbruva@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 189550
Patch to existing ports' Makefile

Upstream was updated for "some substantive bug fixes, and feature additions, ... connection event trapping, unicode, additional dynamic dns servers support, IPv6, and a few other things."

One of the previous patches (for readme.html) did not apply cleanly. Rather than diff between the old and corrected src patches, I will upload the corrected src patch.

Tested on amd64, 11.1-RELEASE-p6.
